reviews.author: Kim Junkmail
reviews.text: We had DJ Misha at our party, and he was absolutely incredible from start to finish. He completely understood the vibe we were going for—elevated, fun, and energetic—and brought it to life perfectly. His music selection was spot-on, just like ai asked him to All seamlessly mixing deep house, fun classics, and crowd favorites that kept everyone on the dance floor all night. The transitions were smooth, the energy never dropped, and he really knew how to read the room. Beyond the music, he was professional, easy to work with, and truly helped create such a memorable atmosphere for our guests. We received so many compliments about him! Highly recommend DJ Misha for any event

reviews.author: Judy Guzman
reviews.text: Amazing experience with DJ Misha! Not only was he super easy to work with but he arrived early to set up, I was able to fully relax because he handled everything with the music, highly recommend!

reviews.author: George Chmiel
reviews.text: Misha did an incredible job performing at our annual Xmas party in 2025. From the start he was a straight pro…coming the week before to scout the space, check acoustics, design the stage/floorplan. The night couldn’t have gone better. Playlist, vibe, energy were fire. Dance floor was packed the entire evening. Everyone had a fantastic time in huge part to his performance. Couldn’t possibly recommend him more than I do and he’ll undoubtedly be back in 2026.

reviews.author: Jimmy DeCicco
reviews.text: DJ Misha was awesome. Truly the highlight of our wedding weekend. He brought Jason on Sax and these two lit up the dance floor. He customized our playlist based on our feedback and read the audience perfectly to keep us all dancing for over 4 hours. Best night of my life. Thank you, Misha!

reviews.author: Amanda Morrison
reviews.text: DJ Misha was a huge hit and wonderful collaborator! The shores of Flathead Lake were truly bumping and the set (and sax) was exactly what we hoped for, keeping people dancing hard from golden hour to dark. As a bonus, DJ Misha also worked with us to put together a fun track with a voicemail from a friend talking about the groom to the bride before they met with a drop to start the party. Highly recommend DJ Misha!

reviews.author: Marc Matuszewski
reviews.text: I've had the pleasure of working alongside DJ Misha at a few weddings, and every time he brings an incredible vibe. He finds a way to blend his style of music into the energy of a wedding, fun and full of life! You can tell he truly knows how to read a crowd and keep guests on the dance floor. Highly recommend him for any event where you want great energy and a unique vibe.

reviews.author: Scott M.
reviews.text: I’ve had the pleasure of working with DJ Misha several times, and he never disappoints. His music selection is always spot on, perfectly reading the crowd and keeping the energy high from start to finish. You can truly see his passion for the craft—it shows in the way he curates every set with care and enthusiasm. Highly recommend him for any event!

reviews.author: Frank 'BJ' Stubbe
reviews.text: DJ Misha was a huge part of the amazing feedback on our wedding. He listened to what we wanted to hear, flexed a little artistic license when needed and put together 4 hours of music we are proud of. Hire him with confidence.

reviews.author: Rebecca Wright
reviews.text: DJ Misha was a really fun DJ, kept the dance floor busy and was really easy to work with.  I would highly recommend if you want a fun night!

reviews.author: Brett Lentz
reviews.text: Everything was flawless through out the whole process from our first call to the last song of the night! Ultimate dance party 🪩 …

reviews.author: Elizabeth Maione
reviews.text: Choosing a DJ for your wedding can feel really overwhelming, and can truly make or break the atmosphere of your day. We knew we didn’t want the typical “wedding DJ” experience with overplayed cliché songs. We were looking for someone who…

reviews.author: Samuel Gillette
reviews.text: DJ Misha put up a stellar performance at our wedding! Him and Jason on the Sax kept the good vibes going from the ceromony to cocktail hour to reception, and kept our guests partying on the dance floor all night long. Leading up to the…

reviews.author: Malinda Watkins
reviews.text: DJ Misha was right on point! Very personable, helpful in picking out play list, professional and easy to communicate with. We also had Jason out to play the wonderful saxophone. They were both wonderful and our wedding guests absolutely love them. Thank you for making our event memorable. You guys rock!!!

reviews.author: themahongroup
reviews.text: We hired DJ Misha for my husband’s 50th birthday party, and he absolutely nailed it! From the moment the music started, the energy was incredible. DJ Misha was professional, easy to work with, and completely understood the vibe we wanted for the evening. The playlist was a perfect mix of classics, crowd-pleasers, and our personal requests—it couldn’t have been better. Our guests couldn’t stop raving about how much fun they had, and it was all thanks to DJ Misha. If you’re looking for a DJ who will elevate your event and create an unforgettable atmosphere, look no further!

reviews.author: Kayla Honarvar
reviews.text: Wedding coordinator here, DJ Misha is amazing!! Super easy to work with before the wedding for all the details. Day of he was on time and professional, and has the coolest vibes. His music selection was fun and engaging, and everyone was on the dance floor by the end of the night! Can't recommend him for DJ services enough and hope to work with Misha again soon!

reviews.author: Events Department
reviews.text: DJ Misha was fantastic at Adam & Alice’s wedding on 09/28/24! He kept the energy high and the dance floor packed all night. Misha was professional, easy to work with, and perfectly captured the couple’s vision. He blended their special requests effortlessly, making the night feel personal and memorable. Highly recommend DJ Misha for any event—he truly knows how to create an amazing experience! ~Penjo

reviews.author: Brittany Denue
reviews.text: DJ Misha is the best!!! Truly had an amazing experience working with him for our wedding. He listened and executed my vision perfectly! When choosing a DJ, I really was looking for someone that would get everyone up on the dance floor and keep the party going and he exceeded all my expectations. I also hired Jason Whitmore sax player to play alongside DJ Misha and truly the duo was the most amazing part of the wedding, all my guests were so impressed and still cannot stop talking about it! The combo DJ and sax is incredible!!! I would recommend DJ Misha in a heart beat!!! Thank you for making our wedding so memorable! - Brittany & Eric

reviews.author: Sophie Moseley
reviews.text: DJ Misha went above and beyond to make our wedding into the best party we've ever been too! He's thoughtful, talented and knows how to engage the crowd. He even sent us a personal playlist from the night after our wedding to enjoy for years to come. We are already thinking of events we can host to hire him again, we were lucky to have him and Jason.

reviews.author: Alice Johnson
reviews.text: DJ Misha was awesome! Very communicative. Gave him some ideas of vibe we wanted for our wedding but asked him to read the room and do what he does best! …..and oh my gosh did he deliver and made our vision of having an epic dance party come alive!!! All of our guests raved about the music & dancing. Even our elderly guests who we didn’t think were capable of loosening up were grooving on the dance floor. THANK YOU DJ Misha for helping make our wedding reception magical and unforgettable!!!!

reviews.author: Katie Quan
reviews.text: We hired DJ Misha for our wedding and we had a great experience! He was so easy to work with because he's very responsive, on time and communicates well. We were able to create playlists to give him an idea of what we wanted for our ceremony, dinner and reception and he kept our reception party going until it ended. He even asked what our dress code was so he could dress accordingly! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Julia Zhang
reviews.text: We hired DJ Misha and Jason Whitmore (saxophone) for my wedding's welcome party at Viewpoint Brewery and were blown away by the entertainment they provided! We went for a tropical and deep house themed vibe, and they curated a wonderful set that complemented both dinner and dancing perfectly. They did a fantastic job engaging our guests and creating an energetic, fun dance floor. DJ Misha also brought dance floor lights and a fog machine. Our guests couldn't stop raving about how awesome the music was. DJ Misha and Jason really nailed their performance and created a unique and memorable experience for everyone. DJ Misha was also incredibly easy to work with and very communicative. Collaborating with him was a seamless experience ahead of the event, and he was very attentive to our musical interests and vision! Our ultimate goal was to ensure our guests had fun, so music was our number one priority for the evening. I highly recommend DJ Misha for weddings or events! 100/10

reviews.author: Katie Heitner
reviews.text: DJ Misha was so great to work with for our wedding this April! We had a tight budget but wanted to have a live music aspect, and he worked it out so quickly. We loved his dance mix of our playlist and ability to customize our whole night with all the music we love. Can't forget to send a huge shout out to Brian with the Sax, who was a HIT at our reception.

reviews.author: Elegance In Frame
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of working with DJ Misha at Adam and Alice's wedding, and I was so impressed! As a wedding photographer, I see a lot of DJs in action, but Misha really knew how to get the party started. The moment the music kicked in,…

reviews.author: Maria Davis
reviews.text: I loved working with Dj Misha! He’s very professional and I could tell he was great at communicating with the couple, guests, and other vendors. His selection of music is amazing and fresh! Super fun and modern soundtracks that make you want to dance 👍🏼 …

reviews.author: Sydne Rennie
reviews.text: We hired DJ Misha for our June 29 wedding in Encinitas and had a great experience!!  From the start, Misha was very easy to communicate with both over text and email.  He was responsive and clear in his communications.  We were looking for someone who would play music we liked rather than just traditional wedding songs, and he made us feel confident that he was the right fit for the job.  As we got closer to the day, he sent us some check-in correspondence re what he needed from us to do his job well - i.e., music suggestions and a 6 foot table!  Not too many needs :)  From there, we made a sample playlist of songs we like along with a Google doc with some additional notes.  Misha quickly responded to the Google doc with comments and questions, which made us feel like he really cared to understand what we were looking for.  He also sent us a sample playlist for feedback.  After that, we did a quick call to further discuss our suggested/required songs and overall vibe we were going for.  He asked great questions and again seemed to genuinely care about getting the songs and vibe right for us!  On the day of, Misha was awesome.  He set up perfectly right by the dance floor and killed it with the song choices.  I know my sister was asking him to play certain songs that we specifically asked he not play and he handled it perfectly, keeping it only to the music we wanted!!  I would absolutely recommend hiring him for your next event!

reviews.author: Mobile Beauty Team
reviews.text: I can't recommend Dj Misha enough! Their energy and professionalism are top-notch, keeping the dance floor packed all night. The music selection was perfect, blending genres to appeal to everyone. They were great to work with and listened to our requests. If you want an unforgettable party, Dj Misha is the way to go!

reviews.author: Colby Smith
reviews.text: Awesome, experience working alongside Misha! He actually played energetic creative music, unlike many who plug n play Wedding Top 50. Set a great soundscape for the beginning portion of the event and finished it off with up beat, unique and some popular tunes. I could tell he did a great job of reading the atmosphere and crowd, enabling him to play the perfect mix. If you’re looking for a DJ and not a Spotify playlist hire Misha!! Best, Colby

reviews.author: Greg Flanders
reviews.text: DJ Misha was great and easy to work with. He also went above and beyond and found an amazing sax player (Jason Whitmore) to accompany him. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Cameron Larkin
reviews.text: Great DJ!! He made our experience more enjoyable by playing songs that went with the moment 😊 The American Dream TV Network convention defiantly would not have been the same without his skills. …

reviews.author: Alma Cuevas
reviews.text: 10 out of 5 stars!  There isn’t a single thing I would have had Misha do differently . Misha played a huge role in making the wedding the perfect celebration  by curating a playlist that kept everyone on the dance floor the entire night! As a planner, he has been one of my favorite vendors to work with, communication was great, attention to detail for what our couple wanted was on point, he even was able to roll with the last minute changes that every wedding tends to have. As a planner, I cannot wait to recommend DJ Misha to my future couples!!

reviews.author: Amanda Liew
reviews.text: DJ Misha was an absolute pleasure to work with!  We consulted with Misha to perform at our wedding in Nantucket, MA.  Despite communicating with him from across the country, Misha was extremely responsive throughout every stage of our planning process providing us with a lot of ease and comfort. The music for our wedding was very important to us, and Misha understood our vision from the very beginning.  While we provided some guidance so that he could understand our style, we let him take a lot of creative freedom in curating the final playlist and it could not have been more perfect.  As the bride, I did not leave the dance floor once, and neither did any of our guests.  It was an absolute blast of a dance party and we could not recommend Misha enough!  Would highly recommend for your wedding or next party. Thank you Misha!!!

reviews.author: Caitlin Stoeckly
reviews.text: DJ Misha was awesome. He was hired for my sisters wedding and the dance floor was so fun all night long. From beginning to end truly the music was perfect. He went the extra mile for me personally (I was the MOH). I wanted an intro/walk up song for my toast and he made it super easy and helped make my vision come to life perfectly. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Jennifer Golden
reviews.text: DJ Misha set a great tone for our party. I wasn’t sure we needed a DJ but it made a big difference and all our guests raved about the music. He is friendly, easy to work with, and very dependable. He came early and set up easily. I highly recommend DJ Misha for any event!!

reviews.author: Rachael Brennan
reviews.text: What a TREAT!! What a VIBE!! DJ Misha and his saxophonist were one of our favorite parts of our wedding night!! He was so easy to work with and no one left the dance floor all night. He collaborates in the most authentic way, where you provide inspiration for the playlist and then he adds his special touch…and makes it even better than you thought!! I could only click 5 stars here, but 10/10 I would recommend DJ Misha to anyone for their special event!!

reviews.author: Sarah Harms
reviews.text: DJ Misha did a fantastic job and San Diego Mission Bay Resort! He was professional and had a great selection of music for the couple. He also played perfectly with a saxophonist to create a super unique and fun experience.

reviews.author: Gaby Picquet
reviews.text: We hired Misha for my husbands bday party. The music was on point, and everyone was on the floor dancing. Misha was easy going and a nice person to work with. I definitely recommend him for your next event.

reviews.author: Nealon Weir
reviews.text: Misha was the DJ at our friend’s wedding in Nantucket, MA. He did an incredible job and kept the dance floor alive all night. I would highly recommend his services!

reviews.author: Katrina Holder
reviews.text: It was a pleasure working with Misha. He was very responsive and accommodating. Would use again in the future for sure!

reviews.author: David Groves
reviews.text: This guy knows his music, and his enthusiasm is infectious. He also knows pacing and how to get people up and having fun. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Chris R
reviews.text: DJ Misha was an incredible partner with us for our wedding, from the planning phase to the actual day of we seriously could not have asked for a better performance. We hired DJ Misha to play the after party for our wedding at the Mission Bay Yacht Club in September from 10pm-12am. He also brought a saxophone player to add a live music element to the party and the sax player absolutely crushed it as a compliment to his DJ set. Through the planning phase, he was very communicative and easy to reach which made our lives a lot easier. We met a few times to discuss our style of music, shared a playlist of our music preferences and style, and what we were going for with the after party and he was always receptive and transparent with his recommendations and feedback, which we truly appreciated. DJ Misha curated a set list of disco, house, and dance music for our after party that exceeded our expectations in every way. The sax player layered on to the performance helped make the best day of our lives even better. Almost two months after our wedding we still have friends and family members raving about DJ Misha's performance that night. From our younger cousins to our older family members, everyone was getting down on the dance floor and had a memorable experience with us on our wedding day. Thanks, DJ Misha!!

reviews.author: Karissa Shannon
reviews.text: DJ Misha is excellent! We had the opportunity to work together this past weekend at Tom Hams Lighthouse San Diego.  I appreciated the flexibility and awesome music. Great setup and lighting too!

reviews.author: kc sd
reviews.text: We hired DJ Misha for my friend’s birthday party and he created an amazing atmosphere with his music from start to finish. People were bouncing through cocktail hour/dinner and sweating on the dance floor later in the night. He read the crowd perfectly and knew just what to play to get people moving. From start to finish he was really easy to work with and I appreciated that we didn’t have to create our own playlist (although we could have if we wanted to) instead describing the vibe we were looking for and he delivered!

reviews.author: Lindsey Snyder
reviews.text: DJ Misha was absolutely perfect for our event. The music he picked for our crowd was on point and set the tone perfectly. We also had Saxophone player Brian Pierini come and play throughout the party. This added touch was everything! Everyone raved about it! The way the two of these guys collaborate together just follows so perfectly through the event. I highly recommend them for your party. You won’t be disappointed!!!

reviews.author: S
reviews.text: DJ Misha, Thank you so much for making our wedding amazing! Everyone said it was the best wedding they’ve ever been to! Thank you for being attentive, caring and taking a vested interest in our needs/vision. You kept everyone on the dance floor all night! My wife and I highly HIGHLY recommend DJ Misha for any event, especially weddings!

reviews.author: Gabrielle Connelly
reviews.text: DJ Misha was awesome! It was so fun to coordinate a wedding with his services! The bride and groom were very particular on music and he executing perfectly! He quite literally kept everyone dancing for THREE hours! The wedding party and guests couldn’t get enough!

reviews.author: Adrian Harris
reviews.text: DJ Misha was excellent for our event. We gave him a very light direction on the kind of music we wanted for the night and he took it from there! We threw him some curve balls as well along the way and he took it all in stride. I highly recommend him for any wedding or other party where you want to dance floor to really pop off.

reviews.author: Jennifer Hughes
reviews.text: DJ Misha did a terrific job at my client's wedding. Everyone was on the dance floor and raved about the music. Great job keeping everyone on their feet as well as the bride and groom who were the last to leave the dance floor. Thanks so much! It is all about the DJ at an event as we all know.

reviews.author: m k
reviews.text: We hired DJ Misha for our Halloween party. He  was punctual , communicative   and play musics we requested , but also brought great musics from his own list. We will definitely hire him again.

reviews.author: Rachel Maher
reviews.text: DJ Misha made my party! He kept the energy up and good vibes flowing. He captured my special requests for certain tunes also. Can’t wait to have another party so he can dj again!

reviews.author: Jeremy LaBahn
reviews.text: DJ Misha is professional, timely, and really good at what he does. As another vendor, I've worked with many DJ's over the years and Misha truly stands apart from the competition. If you're looking for a DJ, he's your guy!

reviews.author: Sarah Mccrystal
reviews.text: I just wanted to say a massive thank you for playing at my recent wedding at Paradise point in San Diego. You did a great job playing great music along with all our requests alongside Jason on Sax. Everyone had such a good night. Thanks Again Sarah

reviews.author: Rose Y
reviews.text: Thank you DJ Misha for bringing thoughtfulness to our company holiday event! You did a brilliant job of listening to our needs and being fluid during the event. Thank you very much. I am glad that we got someone so professional!

reviews.author: Kate Full
reviews.text: Amazing music selection and nice vibe on dance floor! Highly recommend Dj Misha fro your next event in San Diego area!

reviews.author: Daniel Magy
reviews.text: Spectacular DJ.  Can't recommend Misha enough, he is organized and professional.

reviews.author: Cristin Hopkins
reviews.text: Always such a pleasure to work with such organized planners!  You made the entire process seamless, and e appreciate your attention to detail!

reviews.author: Tatyana Budarina
reviews.text: We hired DJ Misha as our wedding DJ as we are very specific in our music tastes and we wanted our wedding music to be as untraditional as possible (no Usher/cupid shuffle etc). DJ Misha made our dream come true, he was easy to work with, had some great suggestions and made everything run smooth! Great person to work with!

reviews.author: Heather Byrd-Henderson
reviews.text: I had the easiest time coordinating with DJ Misha was as easy as could be, I felt as though he had a genuine interest to work with me and make my vision work.…

reviews.author: Eric Saidi
reviews.text: DJ Misha was excellent at the wedding I officiated. Guests were dancing all night long! Sound was good, great equipment, and he was easy to work with!

reviews.author: Quinn Turcich
reviews.text: Misha was an awesome DJ! Great music, easy communication, and very accommodating (he even stayed an extra hour because we were having such a great time. I would 100% recommend!!

reviews.author: August Koster
reviews.text: DJ Misha and Brian on the sax did a great job! We all had a great time and it was awesome having a mix of house music and a live saxophone. Highly recommend! Positive Responsiveness, Quality, Professionalism

reviews.author: Shirley Lara
reviews.text: Positive Responsiveness, Professionalism

reviews.author: Jennifer Lange
reviews.text: I attended a friend's anniversary party, and Misha was DJ.  His music got everyone on the dance floor, and we were there for hours!  It was so much fun!  I would highly recommend DJ Misha for any event.

reviews.author: Chad Olson
reviews.text: DJ Misha saved my wife’s birthday party!  Great DJ, professional, courteous, and rocks the house! Everybody loved him.

reviews.author: Matt G
reviews.text: Misha was the DJ at our wedding.  He is going to be a little different then a typical wedding DJ you may hire because he plays more club, dance style music and totally rocked the dance floor at our party, everyone had an awesome time and it was a night to remember. He also made the process to hire him very easy. I would recommend him to my friends as a great local San Diego DJ at a reasonable price, great music selection and good sound system.

reviews.author: Zohreh Mesri
reviews.text: As a wedding planner, I enjoyed working with Misha. He was quick in responding to my emails. He was on time and kept the evening going smoothly and stuck to the timeline that I had provided to him.

reviews.author: Eric Seiger
reviews.text: What an amazing time we had. Thank you Misha for being amazing.   The music an energy was awesome.   This is the second party we had with dj Misha and will continue bringing him back.   A must!!!!

reviews.author: andi gros
reviews.text: We love Misha, and we had an amazing experience!

reviews.author: Mike Peternel
reviews.text: Misha is legit, fer realzies.

reviews.author: Rebecca Troyan
reviews.text: DJ Misha played at our annual holiday party and did an amazing job.  He read the crowd so well and had everyone smiling, laughing and dancing - I enjoyed the ambiance he created for us. He was very in tune to our party and even turned down the tunes when my husband gave a toast (without us having to ask).  Never once did I feel the music wasn't suitable for the crowd, Misha was spot on the entire night.  We considered creating playlists for the evening and not hiring a DJ for our event - I'm so glad we didn't go that route.  It eliminated the stress of constantly having to figure out what to play next and allowed us more quality time with our guests.  He turned our party up a notch and we plan to have him back next year!

reviews.author: Alexandra Myers
reviews.text: I have worked with DJ Misha many times and can attest to his professional approach to not only playing music, but setting a tone for an event. I highly recommend DJ Misha for corporate and private events.

reviews.author: Vishal Verma
reviews.text: We have used DJ Misha several times and he has always been great. The guests have a great time and he is very professional. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Joanna Nieves
reviews.text: I can attest to the awesome party brought by DJ Misha. He sets the mood and makes you want to dance.

reviews.author: Eva Hum
reviews.text: Great DJ in San Diego for weddings, parties, corporate parties and fun events. Sometimes he plays with a saxophone player. Professional, realizable and great dance music DJ!!
